entity.summary: Moonbeam ecosystem decentralized exchange and AMM protocol. HEI treats Beamswap, BeamSwap Classic, Stable AMM, and V3 rows as one protocol-level DEX entity for v0.
entity.notes: Added from verified-unadded rows hei_unadded_0208 through hei_unadded_0211 as one entity to avoid duplicate version records.

events.title: Beamswap recorded as Moonbeam ecosystem DEX
events.description: Beamswap is recorded as a Moonbeam ecosystem AMM/DEX entity, with classic, stable AMM, and V3 rows consolidated into one HEI record.
events.notes: Replace with a precise launch or version migration event if stronger sources are added.

events.title: Beamex perpetual DEX launched publicly
events.description: Beamswap launched Beamex on Moonbeam as its spot and perpetual trading product with leveraged trading and BLP-based liquidity.
events.notes: The verified-unadded Beamex AMM candidate is modeled as a Beamswap product milestone rather than a separate exchange entity.

evidence.title: Beamswap official app
evidence.notes: Official app domain used to verify Beamswap identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Beamswap
evidence.notes: Source used by verified-unadded backlog row hei_unadded_0208.

evidence.title: DefiLlama references for Beamswap variants
evidence.notes: Backlog rows hei_unadded_0209-0211 referred to Beamswap variant rows.

evidence.title: How to earn rewards for staking Beamex BLP token
evidence.notes: First-party guide explicitly states that Beamex had reached its official public launch and that the BLP token was live.

evidence.title: Beamswap monthly recap 18
evidence.notes: First-party recap confirms Beamex migrated from test releases to Moonbeam mainnet and went live as the protocol's perpetual DEX.

evidence.title: Announcing Beamex, a decentralized perpetual exchange
evidence.notes: First-party announcement identifies Beamex as the perpetual-exchange product developed from and operated by Beamswap.

evidence.title: Beamswap roadmap and recaps
evidence.notes: Current first-party roadmap treats routing through Beamex as part of the Beamswap product suite.
